title: Choriy #2752
definition:
Horite = "cave dweller"

 1) the inhabitants of Mount Seir
 2) the inhabitants of Edom (in later times)
nasbUsage:
Definition: Horite = "cave dweller"

 1) the inhabitants of Mount Seir
 2) the inhabitants of Edom (in later times)

    NASB:  inhab. of Edom, also the name of an Edomite, also the name of a Simeonite
